title: rossolis rotundifolia
intro: Rossolis rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved rossolis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to relieve congestion, coughs, and other respiratory problems, providing various health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved breathing. Herbal preparations of Rossolis rotundifolia typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used as inhalants to aid in respiratory relief.
